visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a light blue and white floral patterned long-sleeved shirt with a sheer mesh overlay, stands in a brightly lit retail environment. She waves enthusiastically and smiles at the camera, positioned centrally in front of a clothing rack filled with various garments. (2) A full-screen graphic overlay transitions in, displaying red, yellow, and blue circles with cartoon faces. The text on the graphic advertises a Taoyuan Taimall Pop-up event spanning from January 4th to January 22nd, featuring the haha baby brand. (3) The camera follows the woman as she moves to her left, showcasing a clothing rack with long-sleeved shirts in black, yellow, and teal. She uses her hands to flip through the hangers, highlighting the patterns while standing in a busy shopping mall with overhead track lights. (4) She transitions to a product display shelf featuring hole shoes or clogs in various colors like pastel pink, white, and navy. A small silver desk lamp is clamped to the shelf, providing direct illumination onto the clogs and their colorful packaging boxes below. (5) The scene shifts to stacks of colorful gift boxes and packaged products. The woman points to boxes of socks and cubes of sanitary pads, which are decorated with vibrant dots and smiling cartoon icons, emphasizing the variety of available merchandise. (6) She picks up and displays a blue thermal water bottle, which is a collaboration product with the brand WOKY. The background shows blurred retail shelves and a haha baby sign, while she holds her smartphone in her other hand. (7) Standing before a large wall covered in individually packaged colorful socks, she gestures toward the extensive selection. The display is organized on a white grid wall with various patterns and lengths visible through the clear plastic bags. (8) She explores a section of stationery and small accessories, touching notebooks, plush bear keychains in pink and purple, and small drawstring pouches. The camera captures her micro-actions as she examines the textures and designs of the items. (9) Picking up blue drawstring pouches in clear packaging, she explains a promotional deal. She holds a large, blue heart-shaped money bank with yellow legs, which is then emphasized by a floating digital cutout of the same object on screen. (10) She showcases red Lunar New Year envelopes featuring cartoon dragon and cat illustrations. She turns them sideways to demonstrate their substantial thickness to the camera, while standing in a red-themed section of the pop-up shop. (11) The visual focus shifts to a shelf of motorcycle helmets decorated with playful patterns of clouds, flowers, and animals. The camera pans across the helmets, showing different colorways including cream, pink, and navy blue in close-up. (12) She concludes by walking through rows of umbrellas and winter jackets. The camera pans across a final rack of hoodies in various colors before she returns to a central spot in front of a red logo sign to wave goodbye.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 我們來看看我們的快閃店. (2) [Slogan]: haha baby x MAMU eggcake. 桃園台茂快閃!!. 01/04 - 01/22. 地點：桃園台茂購物中心B2挑空區. 來找我玩!. (3) [Subtitle]: 這一次有賣什麼. 大人的衣服. 長袖的. (4) [Subtitle]: 然後再來的話. 就是我們的洞洞鞋. 都有帶來. (5) [Subtitle]: 襪子的禮盒. 然後很多人買的衛生棉. (6) [Subtitle]: 三個尺寸都有. 可以來看包裝. 要的可以直接帶回家. [Variety]: 17cm 25.5cm 35cm. (7) [Subtitle]: 保溫杯. 就我們線上沒有賣的. 就跟WOKY合作的保溫杯有. (8) [Subtitle]: 記得以前好像都是兩三款. 現在已經可以出一面那個. 襪子牆了. (9) [Subtitle]: 然後手帳. 筆記本. 束帶也有. 三角桌曆. (10) [Subtitle]: 這邊的話. 就是滿滿的手作. (11) [Subtitle]: 你只要買兩個. 買兩個. 這種造型的. 那個算是背心袋. 收納背心袋兩個. (12) [Subtitle]: 就會直接送你一個. 造型存錢筒. 送哦. 送哦. [Variety]: 送哦. (13) [Subtitle]: 今年的紅包. 你可以來看看實體他有多厚. 真的超厚一個. 然後他這樣兩入99. (14) [Subtitle]: 帽子. 安全帽. 想看花色、實體. 然後想試戴的. 這邊都有. (15) [Subtitle]: 雨傘. 各種花色. 你可以自己來選想要的. 然後摸摸看. (16) [Subtitle]: 然後浴巾毛巾. 背包外套. 全部都有.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 2 distant blurred passers-by in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a light blue and white floral patterned long-sleeved shirt with a sheer mesh overlay.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A retail pop-up store environment within a larger shopping mall. Features include clothing racks, metal display shelves, a grid wall for socks, and various colorful brand signage and posters.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice speaks with a high-pitched, enthusiastic tone and clear articulation, introducing the pop-up store. An upbeat acoustic pop background track with a steady 120 BPM guitar strumming pattern and light percussive elements plays consistently. (2) A digital ding sound effect plays as a graphic appears on screen. The speaker's voice maintains a high arousal level as she describes adult clothing sections. The background ambient noise consists of a very low-level shopping mall murmur. (3) The sound of metal hangers clinking and plastic rustling is audible as the speaker handles various clothing items. The music's volume remains balanced under the narration, featuring clean acoustic guitar textures without any significant distortion. (4) As she introduces thermal bottles and footwear, the vocal pitch remains varied and dynamic. A distinct pop sound effect emphasizes the transition between showing different products. The BGM rhythm is synchronized with her energetic vocal delivery. (5) A cartoonish boing sound effect occurs when a free gift promotion is mentioned. The speaker's vocal volume swells for emphasis on promotional words. The acoustic environment sounds like a large, open indoor retail space with moderate resonance. (6) The sound of paper envelopes being tapped together creates a sharp, percussive rustling sound. The background music begins to fade toward the end, and the female speaker says goodbye with a warm, friendly tone as the track concludes.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Introduction -> Item Showcase -> Promotional Offer -> CTA/Sign-off
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote and provide a virtual tour of the 'haha baby' pop-up store at Taimall, showcasing specific merchandise categories like apparel, shoes, and stationary to attract visitors during the event period.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator is directly representing the brand 'haha baby,' showcasing its products, and announcing pop-up store event details.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-energy, fast-paced editing style typical of short-form social media content to maintain viewer engagement during a product showcase.
